message:
Fix signing key path to expand user home directory and resolve to absolute path

When users provide a signing key path like ~/keys/signing.key, it needs
to be expanded with expanduser() to resolve the ~ to the actual home
directory path, and resolve() to convert to an absolute path.

Without this, Path('~/keys/signing.key').exists() would return False
even if the file exists, because ~ is not automatically expanded.

Changes [lines 904, 914]:
- signing_key = Path(key_path)
+ signing_key = Path(key_path).expanduser().resolve()

This ensures:
- Tilde expansion: ~/keys/signing.key → /home/user/keys/signing.key
- Absolute path: ./keys/foo.key → /abs/path/keys/foo.key
- Symlink resolution: Links resolved to actual files
- Consistent path handling: Matches output_path handling (line 940)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

+        return Confirm.ask("Continue with deployment anyway?", default=False)
+
+    finally:
+        # Always clean up the process, regardless of how we exit
         if process is not None and process.poll() is None:
+            console.print("[dim]Stopping preview server...[/]")
             process.terminate()
             try:
                 process.wait(timeout=5)
             except subprocess.TimeoutExpired:
-                console.print("[yellow]Warning: Preview server did not stop cleanly[/]")
+                console.print("[yellow]Warning: Preview server did not stop cleanly, forcing shutdown...[/]")
                 process.kill()
-        return Confirm.ask("Continue with deployment anyway?", default=False)
+                process.wait()  # Wait for kill to complete
